holdings.infoBox: KRE is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings. The top holdings are Popular stock at 1.66%, Zions Bancorporation, National Association at 1.62%, East West Bancorp at 1.62%, UMB Financial at 1.60%, and Flagstar Bank, National Association at 1.59%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (KRE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Regional Banks Select Industry index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US regional banking stocks. KRE was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by State Street.
